title: fragaria vesca var. bracteata
intro: Fragaria vesca var. bracteata, also known as the Alpine strawberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the wild strawberry plant. This plant is a type of fragaria species, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. Fragaria vesca var. bracteata has been used in herbal medicine for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits, including digestive issues, skin problems, and immune system support.
